description:
Join us on Wednesday, July 15, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for an Aperture tasting featuring Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon, Alexander Valley Red Blend and Chenin Blanc.

Tasting Fee: $35 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Aperture Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon 2023 - Black fruit, cocoa, mint and velvety tannins from mineral-rich Sonoma hillsides.
  • Aperture Alexander Valley Red Blend 2022 - Floral, layered red blend with black and red berries, wet roses and a spiced cocoa finish.
  • Aperture Chenin Blanc 2023 - Bright old-vine Chenin with yuzu, mango, lemongrass and sea-salt minerality.

Come taste through Aperture and find your favorite bottle. Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.
title: Aperture Tasting
